notes: bytes.hex is the component state bytes stored in AppDataDictionary.component_data.data.
bytes.component_data_hex is ComponentData with component_id 0x8004 and an opaque data<V> wrapper.
opaque nostr_group_id<32..32> is encoded with a one-byte vector length.
MarmotNostrRelayV1.url<1..512> is encoded with a two-byte vector length.
relays<V> and data<V> are encoded with four-byte vector lengths.
Relay order is byte-lexicographic and duplicate-free.
This fixture does not include an AppDataUpdate wrapper.
